name: cingulate cortex volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of anterior and posterior cingulate regions.

attributes.name: cingulate volume (total)
attributes.description: Combined volume of left and right cingulate cortex, clinically relevant for global cingulate integrity.

attributes.name: anterior cingulate gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left anterior cingulate gyrus, clinically relevant for executive function and mood regulation.

attributes.name: anterior cingulate gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right anterior cingulate gyrus, clinically relevant for executive function and mood regulation.

attributes.name: posterior cingulate gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left posterior cingulate gyrus, clinically relevant for memory and attention networks.

attributes.name: posterior cingulate gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right posterior cingulate gyrus, clinically relevant for memory and attention networks.
